title: bromus lanceolatus var. lanatus
intro: Bromus lanceolatus var. lanatus, also known as meadow brome, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of meadow brome include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Meadow brome can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and creams to promote wound healing and skin health.
